name: onboarding routes missing Issue-901 (resolvedVia) break-tests
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L4-02] onboarding.test.ts has zero resolvedVia tests; only tests isOwner:false, never isOwner:true + resolvedVia:'auto' for assertOwnerProfile/assertOwnerAndParentAccess. Fix: add [BREAK][Issue 901] tests with resolvedVia:'auto' asserting 403.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: onboarding tests cover isOwner:false and proxy-mode failures, but not the Issue 901 auto-resolved owner case where profileMeta is { isOwner: true, resolvedVia: auto }. Variants: self language assertOwnerProfile, parent-child language/pronouns/interests assertOwnerAndParentAccess, and self pronouns/interests assertNotProxyMode paths must reject auto-resolved owner identity. Regression test: add [BREAK][Issue 901] cases in apps/api/src/routes/onboarding.test.ts asserting 403 and no service call for resolvedVia:auto; tests fail if the resolvedVia requirement is removed.
riskImpact: Regression in the resolvedVia leg would silently allow auto-resolved owner sessions to manage child onboarding/language.
